creator: jacula@gmail.com
text:
this patchset updates:

devel/hs-haddock: 2.4.2 to 2.5.0
devel/hs-haddock-docs:  2.4.2 to 2.5.0
devel/hs-ghc-paths: 0.1.0.5 to 0.1.0.6
devel/hs-ghc-paths-docs: 0.1.0.5 to 0.1.0.6
print/hs-hscolour: 1.15,1 to 1.15.1,1
print/hs-hscolour-docs: 1.15,1 to 1.15.1,1
lang/ghc: 6.10.4_1 to 6.10.4_2

Fix: diff -uNr hs-ghc-paths.orig/Makefile hs-ghc-paths/Makefile
--- hs-ghc-paths.orig/Makefile	2009-09-02 15:38:34.000000000 +0000
+++ hs-ghc-paths/Makefile	2009-12-16 21:47:56.000000000 +0000
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/devel/hs-ghc-paths/Makefile,v 1.1 2009/09/02 15:38:34 pgj Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	ghc-paths
-PORTVERSION=	0.1.0.5
+PORTVERSION=	0.1.0.6
 CATEGORIES=	devel haskell
 MASTER_SITES=	http://hackage.haskell.org/packages/archive/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION}/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	hs-
diff -uNr hs-ghc-paths.orig/distinfo hs-ghc-paths/distinfo
--- hs-ghc-paths.orig/distinfo	2009-09-02 15:38:34.000000000 +0000
+++ hs-ghc-paths/distinfo	2009-12-16 21:43:36.000000000 +0000
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (ghc-paths-0.1.0.5.tar.gz) = 8fdc122e65845d2d53734f78e22c5155
-SHA256 (ghc-paths-0.1.0.5.tar.gz) = ea9e97425894e3dbd7915e00e107e2e7fc07b6e8293fd2dd66a813f0673cba10
-SIZE (ghc-paths-0.1.0.5.tar.gz) = 2304
+MD5 (ghc-paths-0.1.0.6.tar.gz) = 3a53051b128953105ae36e58e4d21d0f
+SHA256 (ghc-paths-0.1.0.6.tar.gz) = 95d8c0e6ce2f182d792e910149b3c81c381b7d2c2052ffc6d96128b071c55243
+SIZE (ghc-paths-0.1.0.6.tar.gz) = 2291
--- patch-hs-ghc-paths ends here ---

diff -uNr hs-haddock.orig/Makefile hs-haddock/Makefile
--- hs-haddock.orig/Makefile	2009-09-02 15:38:35.000000000 +0000
+++ hs-haddock/Makefile	2009-12-17 17:18:41.000000000 +0000
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/devel/hs-haddock/Makefile,v 1.35 2009/09/02 15:38:35 pgj Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	haddock
-PORTVERSION=	2.4.2
+PORTVERSION=	2.5.0
 CATEGORIES=	devel haskell
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.haskell.org/haddock/dist/ \
 		http://hackage.haskell.org/packages/archive/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION}/
@@ -65,6 +65,7 @@
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|/usr/local|${LOCALBASE}|g' \
 		${WRKSRC}/doc/configure.ac
+	@${RM} ${WRKSRC}/src/Haddock/Utils/FastMutInt2.hs
 
 do-configure:
 	cd ${WRKSRC} && ${CABAL_CMD} configure --ghc --prefix=${PREFIX}
diff -uNr hs-haddock.orig/distinfo hs-haddock/distinfo
--- hs-haddock.orig/distinfo	2009-09-02 15:38:35.000000000 +0000
+++ hs-haddock/distinfo	2009-12-16 21:50:01.000000000 +0000
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (haddock-2.4.2.tar.gz) = c1d5238faac72727921130eb792041a2
-SHA256 (haddock-2.4.2.tar.gz) = dbf0a7d0103a3ce6a91b2a3b96148c1b9c13ea7f8bd74260c21fe98df7839547
-SIZE (haddock-2.4.2.tar.gz) = 103033
+MD5 (haddock-2.5.0.tar.gz) = ec674a6854667f6e6fcb3d0cc3d784bb
+SHA256 (haddock-2.5.0.tar.gz) = 038ebe46d3565903e6133284ba4588d51cd90c29185519f034198142a828646c
+SIZE (haddock-2.5.0.tar.gz) = 104639
diff -uNr hs-haddock.orig/files/patch-haddock.cabal hs-haddock/files/patch-haddock.cabal
--- hs-haddock.orig/files/patch-haddock.cabal	1970-01-01 00:00:00.000000000 +0000
+++ hs-haddock/files/patch-haddock.cabal	2009-12-17 17:07:39.000000000 +0000
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+--- haddock.cabal.orig	2009-12-17 17:07:09.000000000 +0000
++++ haddock.cabal	2009-12-17 17:07:18.000000000 +0000
+@@ -92,7 +92,6 @@
+     Haddock.Interface.Rename
+     Haddock.Interface.Create
+     Haddock.Interface.AttachInstances
+-    Haddock.Utils.FastMutInt2
+     Haddock.Utils.BlockTable
+     Haddock.Utils.Html
+     Haddock.Utils
diff -uNr hs-haddock.orig/pkg-plist hs-haddock/pkg-plist
--- hs-haddock.orig/pkg-plist	2009-09-02 15:38:35.000000000 +0000
+++ hs-haddock/pkg-plist	2009-12-16 21:58:28.000000000 +0000
@@ -2,9 +2,7 @@
 bin/haddock
 %%HADDOCK_LIBDIR_REL%%/ghc-%%GHC_VERSION%%/Distribution/Haddock.hi
 %%HADDOCK_LIBDIR_REL%%/ghc-%%GHC_VERSION%%/HShaddock-%%HADDOCK_VERSION%%.o
-%%HADDOCK_LIBDIR_REL%%/ghc-%%GHC_VERSION%%/Haddock/DocName.hi
-%%HADDOCK_LIBDIR_REL%%/ghc-%%GHC_VERSION%%/Haddock/Exception.hi
-%%HADDOCK_LIBDIR_REL%%/ghc-%%GHC_VERSION%%/Haddock/GHC/Utils.hi
+%%HADDOCK_LIBDIR_REL%%/ghc-%%GHC_VERSION%%/Haddock/GhcUtils.hi
 %%HADDOCK_LIBDIR_REL%%/ghc-%%GHC_VERSION%%/Haddock/InterfaceFile.hi
 %%HADDOCK_LIBDIR_REL%%/ghc-%%GHC_VERSION%%/Haddock/Types.hi
 %%HADDOCK_LIBDIR_REL%%/ghc-%%GHC_VERSION%%/Haddock/Utils.hi
@@ -21,7 +19,6 @@
 @dirrm %%DATADIR_REL%%/html
 @dirrm %%DATADIR_REL%%
 @dirrmtry %%DOCSDIR%%
-@dirrm %%HADDOCK_LIBDIR_REL%%/ghc-%%GHC_VERSION%%/Haddock/GHC
 @dirrm %%HADDOCK_LIBDIR_REL%%/ghc-%%GHC_VERSION%%/Haddock
 @dirrm %%HADDOCK_LIBDIR_REL%%/ghc-%%GHC_VERSION%%/Distribution
 @dirrm %%HADDOCK_LIBDIR_REL%%/ghc-%%GHC_VERSION%%
--- patch-hs-haddock ends here ---

diff -uNr hs-hscolour.orig/Makefile hs-hscolour/Makefile
--- hs-hscolour.orig/Makefile	2009-12-27 10:27:32.000000000 +0000
+++ hs-hscolour/Makefile	2009-12-27 11:33:36.000000000 +0000
@@ -8,6 +8,7 @@
 PORTNAME=	hscolour
 PORTVERSION=	1.15
 PORTEPOCH=	1
+PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	print haskell
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.cs.york.ac.uk/pub/haskell/contrib/ \
 		http://hackage.haskell.org/packages/archive/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION}/
@@ -54,8 +55,9 @@
 post-install:
 	${STRIP_CMD} ${PREFIX}/bin/HsColour
 .if !defined(SLAVE)
-	cd ${WRKSRC} && ${INSTALL_SCRIPT} register.sh ${PREFIX}/${HSCOLOUR_LIBDIR_REL}/register.sh  && \
-		${INSTALL_DATA} README ${DOCSDIR}/README
+	cd ${WRKSRC} && ${INSTALL_SCRIPT} register.sh ${PREFIX}/${HSCOLOUR_LIBDIR_REL}/register.sh  \
+		     && ${INSTALL_DATA} README ${DOCSDIR}/README \
+		     && ${INSTALL_DATA} index.html ${DOCSDIR}/index.html
 .endif
 	@${RM} -f ${PREFIX}/lib/ghc-${GHC_VERSION}/package.conf.old
 
diff -uNr hs-hscolour.orig/pkg-plist hs-hscolour/pkg-plist
--- hs-hscolour.orig/pkg-plist	2009-09-02 15:38:41.000000000 +0000
+++ hs-hscolour/pkg-plist	2009-12-27 11:35:37.000000000 +0000
@@ -20,6 +20,7 @@
 %%HSCOLOUR_LIBDIR_REL%%/register.sh
 %%DOCSDIR%%/LICENCE-GPL
 %%DOCSDIR%%/README
+%%DOCSDIR%%/index.html
 %%DATADIR%%/hscolour.css
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%
 @dirrmtry %%DOCSDIR%%
--- patch-hs-hscolour ends here ---
